meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for general-defi — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load all cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep pattern. On hit, read full DB entry via read_file(card.ref, startLine=card.lines[0], endLine=card.lines[1]).

cards.title: Vulnerability Description
cards.detect: The fundamental issue stems from the share minting formula used in vault-based systems:

cards.title: 1. First Depositor / Inflation Attack

cards.title: 32. Reentrancy Lock Bypass via Storage Mode Switch

cards.detect: `_wasActiveAt()` returns true when `disabledTime >= timestamp`.

cards.title: 34. First Depositor Market Bricking
